text: - [ ]  Effective communication and direct observation for alertness and signs and symptoms of heat illness will be conducted frequently. When the subcontractor supervisor is not available, a designated alternate responsible person must be assigned to look for signs and symptoms of heat illness. If a supervisor, designated observer, or any employee reports any signs or symptoms of heat illness in any employee, the supervisor or designated person will take immediate action commensurate with the severity of the illness (see Emergency Response Procedures).
